str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - stay-curious
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: Strategies for Learning to Code with No Prior Experience
entry.summary: In today's digital age, coding has become an indispensable skill for individuals looking to thrive in various industries. However, learning coding from scratch can be daunting for beginners with no prior experience. In this blog post, we present ten effective strategies that will help aspiring coders embark on a successful journey towards proficiency in programming languages like Python, Ruby, or JavaScript. From starting small and focused to joining communities of coders, this guide outlines practical tips that cover every aspect of the learning process, including mastering basics, problem-solving skills, debugging techniques, version control, collaboration, testing, and staying passionate and curious about learning new concepts. Whether you're a complete beginner or struggling with the learning process, these strategies will provide the foundation and resources needed to develop strong coding principles and advance your skills over time. So, roll up your sleeves, grab your laptop, and let's dive into the world of programming together! #LearnCodingTogether
